PASS_FAIL
FAIL

FINDINGS
1. No concrete proof artifacts are present in the cited execution points. [docs/PLAN.md:39](/Users/ursmuff/.codex/worktrees/4577/Coherence-Network/docs/PLAN.md:39) and [docs/STATUS.md:49](/Users/ursmuff/.codex/worktrees/4577/Coherence-Network/docs/STATUS.md:49) state priorities, but do not include fresh-worktree proof, gate outputs, or evidence records.
2. Goal alignment is only partial-textual: throughput/issue-cycle intent is explicit at [docs/STATUS.md:49](/Users/ursmuff/.codex/worktrees/4577/Coherence-Network/docs/STATUS.md:49), but measured quality/success-rate impact and PLAN objective traceability are not evidenced.

REQUIRED_RETRIES
1. Add mandatory fresh-worktree proof artifact (worktree path/branch + timestamped `make start-gate` pass evidence).
2. Add concrete execution evidence for throughput/quality movement (before/after success-rate or cycle-time metric, plus issue-loop closure data).
3. Add explicit trace mapping from execution artifact(s) to PLAN objective and milestone targets, not just priority text.

UNBLOCK_GUIDANCE
1. Capture and attach proof from:
`git rev-parse --show-toplevel`
`git branch --show-current`
`make start-gate`
2. Record evidence in the project’s required audit artifact and reference it from status/plan update.
3. Re-submit strong review with direct artifact links and metric deltas tied to PLAN objective.
